ddls:
CREATE TABLE "channels" (
  "channel_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each channel */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the channel */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the channel is located */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date when the channel was created */,
  "updated_on" TEXT /* Date when the channel was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the channel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "channel_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "channel_id" TEXT /* ID of the channel the category belongs to */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "channel_id" TEXT /* ID of the channel the video belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the video */,
  "assignable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the video can be assigned to other channels */,
  "created_on" TEXT /* Date when the video was created */,
  "updated_on" TEXT /* Date when the video was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_videos_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_categories" (
  "video_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video category */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video the category belongs to */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_categories_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_categories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES channel_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video being assigned */,
  "channel_id" TEXT /* ID of the channel the video is being assigned to */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the video was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_assignments_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_assignments_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g. admin, moderator, creator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_channel_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "channel_id" TEXT /* ID of the channel */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g. read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_channel_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_channel_access_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES channels ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date when the revision was made */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the revision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_revisions_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "video_engagement" (
  "engagement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engagement */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes */,
  "comment_count" INTEGER /* Number of comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engagement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_video_engagement_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)
